Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 34 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 132 upvotes, 12 comments
  3. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 110 upvotes, 10 comments
  4. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 308 upvotes, 54 comments
  5. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 51 upvotes, 5 comments
  6. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 773 upvotes, 160 comments
  7. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 88 upvotes, 13 comments
  8. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 150 upvotes, 28 comments
  9. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 35 upvotes, 4 comments
  10. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 49 upvotes, 7 comments
  11. Embarrassingly simple self-distillation improves code generation 601 upvotes, 181 comments
  12. Demonstrating Real Time AV2 Decoding on Consumer Laptops 30 upvotes, 4 comments
  13. Dynamics of (Not) Being Perceived: Grief and Relief After Leaving Social Media 16 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. AWS engineer reports PostgreSQL perf halved by Linux 7.0, fix may not be easy 303 upvotes, 92 comments
  15. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 207 upvotes, 64 comments
  16. Components of a Coding Agent 240 upvotes, 77 comments
  17. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 166 upvotes, 53 comments
  18. Modern Generic SVGA driver for Windows 3.1 45 upvotes, 10 comments
  19. Show HN: OsintRadar – Curated directory for osint tools 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  20. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 436 upvotes, 195 comments
  21. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 658 upvotes, 315 comments
  22. Show HN: I built a small app for FSI German Course 37 upvotes, 12 comments
  23. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input, in Rust 73 upvotes, 30 comments
  24. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 162 upvotes, 79 comments
  25. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 81 upvotes, 36 comments
  26. Unverified: What Practitioners Post About OCR, Agents, and Tables 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  27. Talk like caveman 61 upvotes, 38 comments
  28. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 300 upvotes, 262 comments
  29. Electrical transformer manufacturing is throttling the electrified future 89 upvotes, 81 comments
  30. Ask HN: Is there any interest in a native Qt/C++ Discord client? 5 upvotes, 9 comments

Last generated 7:00pm, 5 April 2026. Source here.
